scripts.build: vite build && npm run build:server && npm run copy:config
scripts.build:server: node -e "const path = require('path'); const abs = path.resolve('dist'); console.log(abs);" && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/server.cjs --format=cjs --external:vite
scripts.copy:config: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const destDir = path.join(__dirname, 'dist', 'src', 'data'); if (!fs.existsSync(destDir)) fs.mkdirSync(destDir, { recursive: true }); const srcPath = path.join(__dirname, 'src', 'data', 'config.json'); if (fs.existsSync(srcPath)) fs.copyFileSync(srcPath, path.join(destDir, 'config.json')); console.log('Config copied');"
